values.name: view
values.comment: Create a tab interface. Pass in a unique id and a zipper of (tab header content, panel content) pairs.

values.name: update
values.comment: Map over this to select a tab.

name: Tabs.Model
comment: @docs Model, TabPanels, TabAndPanel, tabAndPanel, section, selected

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The model contains tabpanels and the groupid for the tab collection.

aliases.name: TabAndPanel
aliases.comment: Internal represenation of a tab/panel pair.
aliases.type: { identifier : Int, tabContent : Html Never, panelContent : Html Never, section : String, isSelected : Bool }

aliases.name: TabPanels
aliases.comment: Zipper tabs are represented as a Zipper with an id, tab html, and tab panel html.
aliases.type: Zipper ( Int, Html Never, Html Never )

values.name: section
values.comment: Set a TabAndPanel section to be the given string.

values.name: selected
values.comment: Set a TabAndPanel to be selected.

values.name: tabAndPanel
values.comment: Initialize a pre-selection and pre-section tab/panel pair.
values.type: ( Int, Html Never, Html Never ) -> TabAndPanel
